name: shape-rotator-field-guide
description: Cohort field-guide Electron app for the Shape Rotator program. Atlas of indexed pages, alchemy view of the cohort (teams + projects + people), local-first peer search via swf-node, and a profile editor that submits PRs against this repo.

scripts.vendor:web: rm -rf apps/web/shape-ui && cp -R packages/shape-ui apps/web/shape-ui && cp apps/field-guide/src/cohort-surface.json apps/web/cohort-surface.json
scripts.deploy:web: npm run vendor:web && cd apps/web && vercel deploy --prod --yes
